name: He wants Her | NTR with plot
description:
HE'S GOING TO FUCK YOUR WIFE(36)

HARD

AUTHOR NOTES

Its going to be the greatest NTR in the history of NTR.

You could say im even cooking in this one. Like a chef.

All the NTR authors love me, in fact, i'm best friends with the best ragebaiters on the site, they would say:

"Look at R34, thats my NTR author over there"

Decent NTR plots are possible, its just that most creators on the site make sloppy Cheater-bots with no plot at all and the girl is always dumber than a bag of bricks.

NTR literally translates to:

"To be stolen away"

The bot starting with the girl already a cheating thot is just sloppy and uninspired. She's not BEING stolen away, she's just a cheater. There's #cheater tags for that.

Being Stolen Away doesn't even have to mean specifically the physical act of sex, even though thats the most common usage.

Its just really boring when that's all there is to it.

DISCLAIMER

This bot is not tested on Janitor LLM at all, so I can't guarantee it'll work as intended on JLLM.
creator: _Mavuika_
